title: B1 Listening - Part 1 - Test 14
instructions: For each question, listen to the recording and choose the correct answer: A, B or C.

items.context: You hear two students arranging a book club meeting.
items.audio_script: Boy: Have you seen the message about the book club meeting? I wrote down in the café, but I cannot find the message now. || Girl: That was the original plan, but the café will be closed for a private event. [1]We need to meet in the upstairs library room instead[/1]. || Boy: Thanks for telling me. I would have waited in the café and missed everyone. || Girl: No problem. I will get there a few minutes early, and I will text you if the organiser changes anything again before we leave.
items.question: Where will the book club meet?
items.explanation: They will meet in the upstairs library room.

items.context: You hear two friends preparing for a day at the beach.
items.audio_script: Woman: Have you packed for the beach trip? I was going to take a beach ball. Is that still right? || Man: It was on the first list, but the forecast says it will be very sunny and there are towels in the car. [2]You need to bring sun cream instead[/2]. || Woman: Good thing I asked. I nearly closed my bag without it. || Man: Put it in now and check again before you leave. The organiser said we must be ready on time tomorrow, because the group cannot wait for anyone who forgets something important.
items.question: What should they take?
items.explanation: They need to take sun cream.

items.context: You hear two friends deciding what to do.
items.audio_script: Man: Are we still going to go to the zoo this afternoon? I told my family I would be home later. || Woman: That was our first idea, but several animal areas are closed today. We could go to play basketball, though the sports centre has no free courts. [3]We are going to visit the science museum instead[/3]. || Man: That sounds good. Shall we meet near the station? || Woman: Yes, at four. I will book our places now, so there should not be a problem when we arrive.
items.question: What are they going to do?
items.explanation: They decide to visit a science museum.

items.context: You hear two people talking about going to the cinema.
items.audio_script: Girl: I need to check the time for the film tonight. I wrote down half past six, but I am not sure it is correct. || Boy: It changed this morning because the earlier showing has been cancelled. [4]It starts at quarter to seven now[/4], and we should arrive ten minutes earlier. || Girl: I am glad I asked. I would have arrived at the wrong time. || Boy: I will send you a reminder later. Bring everything you need, because there will not be time to go back home first.
items.question: What time does the film start?
items.explanation: The film now starts at quarter to seven.

items.context: You hear two people discussing a washing machine.
items.audio_script: Boy: How are you getting on with the washing machine? I heard there was a problem with it. || Girl: I first thought it was making too much noise, and my brother wondered whether the door would not open. But the shop checked it carefully this morning. [5]It is leaking water onto the floor[/5]. || Boy: Can they fix that before the visitors arrive tomorrow? || Girl: They think so. Now they know what is wrong, it should be ready tomorrow afternoon. That is a relief, because I need to use it this weekend.
items.question: What is wrong with the washing machine?

items.context: You hear two people planning a journey to the station.
items.audio_script: Woman: How are you travelling to the railway station on Saturday? I thought you were going by bus. || Man: I planned to, but the early bus does not run on Sundays. I considered going on foot, but our cases are too heavy to carry. [6]I am going by taxi instead[/6]. || Woman: That sounds sensible. What time will you arrive? || Man: Just before eleven, if everything is on time. I checked the timetable online, so we have plenty of time, and I will message you when I leave home.
items.question: How will they get to the station?

items.context: You hear two people buying a present.
items.audio_script: Man: Did you buy a book for my brother's birthday? I saw one yesterday and thought it would be suitable. || Woman: No. I looked at a book, and I nearly chose a sports bag, but he has already read the book and recently bought a new bag. [7]I bought a set of headphones in the end[/7]. || Man: That sounds like the right choice. It is more useful than the other things. || Woman: I hope so. I kept the receipt in case I need to change it later.
items.question: What did the speaker buy?
